title: My Work - make all columns available and selectable by the user
excerpt: Please make all columns available for display and actionable from the My Work page.  This would make Non-PM workers access so much more productive.

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: Please make all columns available for display and actionable from the My Work page. This would make Non-PM workers access so much more productive.
